title: Enhanced API Tracking Features

title: Enhanced User Experience

title: Enhanced AI SDK Features
changes: Open Quick Chat directly from the Documents folder.
Improved agent concurrency handling for better performance.

changes: Introducing a quick chat feature for easier communication.

title: Auto-Earn — AI handles your Freelancer.com inbox
changes: Auto-Earn: AI can now automatically reply to client messages and submit bids on Freelancer.com
Assisted mode — AI drafts every reply and bid, you review and click Send
Full-auto mode — AI sends autonomously within your configured limits (opt-in, requires explicit confirmation)
Smart triage — payments, contracts, off-platform requests, and scope disputes are always routed to you, never auto-replied
Governor limits — hourly message caps, daily bid budgets, and active-hours windows keep behaviour within safe bounds
Humanizer built in — all AI-written messages are stripped of AI patterns and special characters so they read like you wrote them
Anomaly protection — Auto-Earn pauses automatically if the platform returns rate limits or suspicious responses
Escalation inbox — important situations surface as notifications via desktop and your connected channels (Discord, WhatsApp, Email)
Earnings dashboard — track bids sent, replies made, and jobs in progress from the Freelance tab

title: Freelance improvements, Humanizer skill & more
changes: Sent bids no longer reappear in Drafts & queue after marking as placed
Listings tab now shows a Bid Placed badge once a proposal has been sent
New built-in Humanizer skill — instruct any agent to write like a real person, not an AI
Freelance agents now use humanizer rules automatically so bids avoid AI patterns and special characters
Agent input dialogs now show the agent name and its color instead of a generic title
What's New popup — you'll now see a summary of changes after each update
